name: lib-3-calls-reel
caption:
The 3 calls every trade misses — and what they're worth.

The on-the-tools call. The after-hours emergency. The lunchtime quote-chaser. Miss them and they don't come back — they ring the next trade.

Free missed-call audit in bio. 👇

#plumber #electrician #tradeslife #missedcalls #ukandireland

cards.headline: The after-hours emergency.
cards.body: 9pm. You're done for the day. They're not.

cards.headline: The lunchtime quote-chaser.
cards.body: Ringing round 3 trades. First to answer wins.

cards.headline: Miss them and they don't come back.
